projectDescription: Pedal is a consumer-facing car rental web platform that allows users in Peru to browse vehicles by brand, select pickup locations and times, and make reservations.
keyFeatures: Vehicle catalog with brand filtering (Honda, Chevrolet, Volvo, Mitsubishi, Volkswagen)
Interactive booking form with location, date, and time selection
Multiple pickup and drop-off locations across Lima (Miraflores, San Isidro, San Miguel)
Car type categories: Compact, Sedan, SUV, Pickup
Animated loading screen and smooth scroll navigation
Service coverage map showing available regions in Peru
24/7 customer support and strategic location network
Multi-language data attributes (Spanish/English) for i18n readiness
publicApiSurface: Booking form: vehicle type, usage date, pickup time/location, return time/location
Brand filter buttons: honda, chevrolet, volvo, mitsubishi, volkswagen
Department modal: Lima, Ica, Arequipa, Ancash, Piura
Google Maps embed for Lima service area
